caption: The video presents a news broadcast segment from "plustv," indicated by a logo in the upper left corner of the screen. A purple graphic overlays the display, featuring a small inset image of a man in a red cap and a white garment on the left. Text next to him reads "ON THE PHONE," "OLUSOLA OYEKANMI," "POLITICAL ANALYST," and "LAGOS." To the right, a larger video feed shows a man with glasses wearing a blue cap and a light-blue traditional garment. Below these visuals, a white banner contains the text "PLUS POLITICS" in purple and the headline "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU" in bold black letters. A lower white bar displays "SUBSCRIBE" and "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA LIFESTYLE" in the first half of the sequence, which then changes to "WATCH ONLINE" and "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV" followed by "WATCH ON" in the latter half. The visuals of the two men remain static across the frames.
